name: chattr
description: Multi-user video calling app on a custom WebRTC SFU. Mediasoup under the hood.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client run test:unit
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
